name: Grilled Salmon w/ Roasted White Corn Salsa & Basil Cream
recipeIngredient: 6 6-Ounce Salmon Fillets or Steaks, cut 1/2-inch thick
recipeInstructions:
1. Whisk olive oil, zest, mint, salt and pepper together and marinate salmon in mixture for 1 hour.
2. At serving time, grill salmon over hot coals until just done.
3. Place on warm plates with a heaping tablespoon or two of corn salsa on top, warm basil cream around and a garnish of herb sprigs.
4. Serve immediately.
